payload.answer: This appears to be additive: the new preference can be added without replacing the existing one.
repair_options: add_new: Add 'Sam from Goldman also likes Sonny Rollins' as a separate preference while keeping the existing Bill Evans preference.

edit: Revise the preference wording before saving, e.g. 'Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans and Sonny Rollins.'
cancel: Do not make any changes.
